title: lagenocarpus martii f. dioicus
intro: Lagenocarpus martii f. dioicus, also known as the dioecious form of the Mart's needle grass, is a plant species native to Brazil. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagenocarpus martii f. dioicus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
